  static FuncDef aDateTimeFuncs[] = {

#ifdef SQLITE_DEBUG

    DFUNCTION(current_timestamp, 0, 0, 0, ctimestampFunc),

#else
    STR_FUNCTION(current_time,      0, "%H:%M:%S",          0, currentTimeFunc),
